# Start with a complete foundation

Templates are the fastest way to move from idea to polished UI. Instead of assembling every primitive manually, you begin with a structured baseline and then adapt it to your product voice, features, and content model.

Each collection below gives you a different starting point: Odyssey-first motion patterns, well-known UI ecosystems, utility-first sections, and prebuilt interaction groups that can scale into full pages.

## Why templates first

- You reduce setup time and avoid repetitive boilerplate.
- You keep visual consistency while still controlling implementation details.
- You can mix patterns from multiple ecosystems without rewriting your entire stack.
